name: pyunfoldedcircleremote

metadata.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote
metadata.summary: A python library to interact with the Unfolded Circle Remote

documentation:
# Python Unfolded Circle Library

This is a library to interact with the unfolded circle devices. More detail to follow

modules.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.websocket
documentation: Unfolded Circle Dock Web Socket Module

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.websocket.LoggerAdapter
documentation:
Logger class for websocket for debugging.
Add connection ID and client IP address to websockets logs.

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.websocket.Websocket

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.websocket.Websocket.send_message
documentation: Send a message to the connected websocket.
Web Socket Class for Unfolded Circle

modules.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock_websocket
documentation: Unfolded Circle Dock Web Socket Module

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock_websocket.LoggerAdapter
documentation:
Logger class for websocket for debugging.
Add connection ID and client IP address to websockets logs.

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock_websocket.DockWebsocket

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock_websocket.DockWebsocket.init_websocket
documentation: Initialize websocket connection with the dock password.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock_websocket.DockWebsocket.is_password_valid
documentation: Initialize websocket connection with the dock password.
Web Socket Class for Unfolded Circle Dock

modules.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote_websocket
documentation: Unfolded Circle Remote Web Socket Module

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote_websocket.LoggerAdapter
documentation:
Logger class for websocket for debugging.
Add connection ID and client IP address to websockets logs.

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote_websocket.RemoteWebsocket

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote_websocket.RemoteWebsocket.init_websocket
documentation: Initialize websocket connection with the registered API key.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote_websocket.RemoteWebsocket.create_api_key
documentation: Create API key using rest API. Need to call login_api first

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote_websocket.RemoteWebsocket.delete_api_key
documentation: Delete registered API key. Need to call login_api first.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote_websocket.RemoteWebsocket.login_api
documentation:
Login to the remote using rest API with basic
authentication with the provided username/password.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote_websocket.RemoteWebsocket.logout_api
documentation: Logout from the rest API session.
Web Socket Class for Unfolded Circle Remote

modules.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock
documentation: Module to interact with the Unfolded Circle Remote Two Dock.

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.HTTPError
documentation: Raised when an HTTP operation fails.

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.SystemCommandNotFound
documentation: Raised when an invalid system command is supplied.

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.ExternalSystemNotRegistered
documentation: Raised when an unregistered external system is supplied.

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.InvalidIRFormat
documentation: Raised when invalid or insufficient IR details are passed.

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.NoEmitterFound
documentation: Raised when no emitter could be identified from criteria given.

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.ApiKeyNotFound
documentation:
Raised when API Key with given name can't be found.

Attributes:
    name -- Name of the API Key
    message -- explanation of the error

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.Dock.__init__
documentation: Create a new UC Dock Object.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.Dock.has_password
documentation: returns true if password of the dock is set.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.Dock.validate_url
documentation: Validate passed in URL and attempts to correct api endpoint if path isn't supplied.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.Dock.derive_configuration_url
documentation: Derive configuration url from endpoint url.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.Dock.url_is_secure
documentation: Returns true if the configuration url is using a secure protocol

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.Dock.client
documentation: Create a aiohttp client object with needed headers and defaults.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.Dock.validate_connection
documentation: Validate we can communicate with the remote given the supplied information.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.Dock.raise_on_error
documentation: Raise an HTTP error if the response returns poorly.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.Dock.get_remotes
documentation: Get list of remotes defined. (IR Remotes as defined by Unfolded Circle).

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.Dock.get_remotes_complete
documentation: Get list of remotes defined. (IR Remotes as defined by Unfolded Circle).

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.Dock.get_custom_codesets
documentation: Get list of custom ir codesets.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.Dock.create_remote
documentation: Create a new remote codeset. (IR Remotes as defined by Unfolded Circle).

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.Dock.send_command
documentation: Send a command to the dock

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.Dock.update_from_message
documentation: Update internal data from received websocket messages

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.dock.Dock.update
documentation: Updates all information about the remote.

modules.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote
documentation: Module to interact with the Unfolded Circle Remote Two.

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.HTTPError
documentation: Raised when an HTTP operation fails.

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.ExternalSystemAlreadyRegistered
documentation: Raised when the supplied external system is already registered

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.SystemCommandNotFound
documentation: Raised when an invalid system command is supplied.

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.RemoteIsSleeping
documentation: Raised when the remote doesn't wake from sleep.

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.ExternalSystemNotRegistered
documentation: Raised when an unregistered external system is supplied.

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.InvalidIRFormat
documentation: Raised when invalid or insufficient IR details are passed.

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.NoEmitterFound
documentation: Raised when no emitter could be identified from criteria given.

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.ApiKeyNotFound
documentation:
Raised when API Key with given name can't be found.

Attributes:
    name -- Name of the API Key
    message -- explanation of the error

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.ApiKeyRevokeError
documentation: Raised when failing to revoke existing api key

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.ApiKeyCreateError
documentation: Raised when unable to create api key

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.__init__
documentation: Create a new UC Remote Object.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.memory_available
documentation: Percentage of Memory used on the remote.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.storage_available
documentation: Percentage of Storage used on the remote.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.battery_level
documentation: Integer percent of battery level remaining.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.automatic_updates
documentation: Does remote have automatic updates turned on.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.check_for_updates
documentation: Does remote automatically check for updates.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.is_simulator
documentation: Is the device a simulated remote

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.last_update_type
documentation: Last update type from received message.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.wake_on_lan_retries
documentation: The number of tries to connect after a WOL attempt

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.validate_url
documentation: Validate passed in URL and attempts to correct api endpoint if path isn't supplied.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.derive_configuration_url
documentation: Derive configuration url from endpoint url.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.url_is_secure
documentation: Returns true if the configuration url is using a secure protocol

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.name_from_model_id
documentation: Returns the Remote Model name for a given model ID

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.client
documentation: Create a aiohttp client object with needed headers and defaults.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.validate_connection
documentation: Validate we can communicate with the remote given the supplied information.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.wake
documentation: Sends a magic packet to attempt to wake the device while asleep.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.raise_on_error
documentation: Raise an HTTP error if the response returns poorly.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.create_api_key_revoke_if_exists
documentation: Creates an API key and revokes any that presently exists

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_registered_external_systems
documentation:
Returns an array of dict[system,name] representing
the registered external systems on the remote

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_registered_external_system
documentation: Lists available token information for the given system

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.set_token_for_external_system
documentation:
This method allows the external system to automatically provide the access
token for the corresponding R2 integration instead of forcing the user to type it in.
If the token name already exists for the given system, error 422 is returned.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.update_token_for_external_system
documentation:
This methods allows an already provided token of an external system to be updated.
The token is identified by the system name and the token identification.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.delete_token_for_external_system
documentation: Deletes supplied token for the given system.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.is_external_system_valid
documentation:
Checks against the registered external systems on the remote
to validate the supplied system name.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.external_system_has_token
documentation:
Checks against the external system on the remote
to see if a token has been registered.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_integrations
documentation: Retrieves the list of integration instances.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_driver_instance
documentation: Retrieves the driver instance from its driver id

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.create_driver_instance
documentation: Retrieves the driver instance from its driver id

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_integration_instance_by_driver_id
documentation: Returns driver information for a given integration instance ID

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_remote_wifi_info
documentation: Get System wifi information from remote. address.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_remote_information
documentation:
Get System information from remote. model_name,
model_number, serial_number, hw_revision.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_remote_configuration
documentation: Get System configuration from remote. User supplied remote name.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_remote_drivers
documentation: List the integrations drivers on the remote.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.start_driver_by_id
documentation: Issue a command to the supplied integrations drivers on the remote.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_remote_integrations
documentation: List the integrations instances on the remote.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_remote_integration_entities
documentation: Get the available entities of the given integration on the remote.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.set_remote_integration_entities
documentation: Set the available entities of the given integration on the remote.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_remote_subscribed_entities
documentation: Return the list of subscribed entities for the given integration id.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.add_remote_entities
documentation: Subscribe to the selected entities for the given integration id.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_activities
documentation: Return activities from Unfolded Circle Remote.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_activities_state
documentation: Get activity state for all activities.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_activity_groups
documentation: Return activity groups with the list of activity IDs from Unfolded Circle Remote.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_remote_battery_information
documentation: Get Battery information from remote. battery_level, battery_status, is_charging.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_stats
documentation: Get usage stats from the remote.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_remote_ambient_light_information
documentation: Get Remote Ambient Light Level. ambient_light_intensity.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_remote_force_update_information
documentation: Force a remote firmware update check.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_activity_state
documentation: Get activity state for a remote entity.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_activity
documentation: Get activity state for a remote entity.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.post_system_command
documentation: POST a system command to the remote.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_remotes
documentation: Get list of remotes defined. (IR Remotes as defined by Unfolded Circle).

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.get_custom_codesets
documentation: Get list of IR code sets defined.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.send_remote_command
documentation: Send a remote command to the dock kwargs: code,format,dock,port.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.update_from_message
documentation:
Update internal data from received websocket messages
data instead of polling the remote

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.init
documentation: Retrieves all information about the remote.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.update
documentation: Updates all information about the remote.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Remote.polling_update
documentation: Updates only polled information from the remote.

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.UCMediaPlayerEntity

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.UCMediaPlayerEntity.select_source
documentation: Select source of the media player.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.UCMediaPlayerEntity.volume_up
documentation: Raise volume of the media player.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.UCMediaPlayerEntity.volume_down
documentation: Decrease the volume of the media player.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.UCMediaPlayerEntity.mute
documentation: Mute the volume of the media player.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.UCMediaPlayerEntity.volume_set
documentation: Raise volume of the media player.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.UCMediaPlayerEntity.next
documentation: Next track/chapter of the media player.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.UCMediaPlayerEntity.previous
documentation: Previous track/chapter of the media player.

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.UCMediaPlayerEntity.seek
documentation: Skip to given media position of the media player.
Internal class to track the media player entities reported by the remote

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.ActivityGroup

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.ActivityGroup.update
documentation: Update activity state information only for active activities.
Class representing a Unfolded Circle Remote Activity Group.

classes.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Activity

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Activity.has_media_player_entities
documentation: Returns true if activity has media players

methods.name: pyUnfoldedCircleRemote.remote.Activity.mediaplayer_entities
documentation: Media player entities associated to this activity
Class representing a Unfolded Circle Remote Activity.
